user.title: Create virtual IR device
user.description: Configure a local MQTT-backed infrared device.

data_description.friendly_name: Used to build zigbee2mqtt/<friendly_name>/set when no explicit topic is provided.

manual.title: Manual commands
manual.description: Enter IR codes directly for this virtual device.

codepack_type.title: Bundled codepack type
codepack_type.description: Choose the type of bundled SmartIR-compatible codepack to use.

codepack_manufacturer.title: Bundled codepack manufacturer
codepack_manufacturer.description: Choose the manufacturer from bundled codepacks.

error.friendly_name_or_topic_required: Enter either a Zigbee2MQTT friendly name or an MQTT topic.

abort.already_configured: This IRBridge device is already configured.
abort.no_codepacks: No valid bundled codepacks were found.
